## Description

Provide a detailed summary of the changes introduced.

## Validation Checklist

- Local test suite passing (run `make test`)
- Verified SVG files are well-formed XML
- Checked that all local link/image references exist
- No comments added to configuration/code files

## Types of Changes

- Chore (refactoring, formatting, linting)
- Automation (updates to workflows or task runner)
- Documentation (updates to README or guides)
